column3: A large and aggressive forest troll.
The dungeon guide. He has seen many adventurers pass through.
A hulking guardian of the dungeon depths.
A friendly banker who manages the town vault.
The innkeeper of the hub town. She knows all the local gossip.
A steadfast guard protecting the hub town.
An ancient spirit of the forest. Offer it 10 oak logs to awaken it.
A hungry wolf hunting in the forest.
A corrupted ranger who patrols the deep forest.
A hulking creature grown from the ancient forest floor.
The village blacksmith. He can smith items for a price — or teach you how.
